summary: Good audience recording captures a solid 1984 outdoor show with a strong first set and an acceptable short second set.
review: The three reviewers all praise this audience tape as a good representation of the 1984 outdoor concert, noting clear sound and overall enjoyment. The performance is described as very good in the first set and merely acceptable in the brief second set, making it a worthwhile listen for fans seeking the complete show.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive reviews (5‑star and two 4‑star) highlight both decent show performance and a good audience recording, yielding a solid combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the tape as a good AUD version with no major flaws noted; sound is clear enough for an outdoor show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Short outdoor set with a very strong first set and an acceptable second set, overall enjoyable despite its brevity.
